case_title: ANFAL FERHI VS. BAY BRIDGE TOWING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY FERHI, ANFAL AS TO DEFENDANT BAY BRIDGE TOWING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING. NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF ANFAL FERHI AND DEFENDANT BAY BRIDGE TOWING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
